title: When Where can I see it
display_title: When Where can I see it
wikitext:
[]: When/Where can I see it?             Quote Post by anatrok » Thu Oct 11, 2007 5:57 pm Seriously...is there no information on an English release? and if there is no plans for an English release yet, when is it coming out on DVD (or other home video format...) in Japan?

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Thu Oct 11, 2007 6:16 pm No news on any licensing, although I'm sure ADV is probably working on it (an interview of CEO says it could take 6 months of negotiation to work out a license, IIRC). No word on an R2 DVD release date, wild guess would be early next year. R1 release will not be for a while so you're best bet for watching it ASAP is to steal it from the internet when it gets fansubbed.

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Thu Oct 11, 2007 6:39 pm adv's stance at the negotiation table " you went with manga once and look what happened :P "

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Thu Oct 11, 2007 6:42 pm I'm going to go ahead and use this opportunity to say how there are VERY SMALL CAMERAS that are practically undetectable that you could EASILY SNEAK INTO A THEATER WITHOUT GETTING SEEN...

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Thu Oct 11, 2007 6:48 pm ...AND FILM A BOOTLEG that is VERY SMALL and almost certainly unwatchable?

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Thu Oct 11, 2007 6:48 pm they've been cracking down on this a lot in Japan hence the lack of a rebuild cam

[]:             Quote Post by TriLink » Thu Oct 11, 2007 6:54 pm Why, in God's name, would you want your first viewing of Rebuild to be some shitty bootleg with shitty video and even shittier audio? That'd be shitty.

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Thu Oct 11, 2007 7:09 pm TriLink12 wrote: Why, in God's name, would you want your first viewing of Rebuild to be some shitty bootleg with shitty video and even shittier audio?

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Thu Oct 11, 2007 7:16 pm ...True, but.... WE'D STILL HAVE THE OPTION... Oh, who am I kidding. I promised myself I wouldn't watch it unless the bootleg was really good.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Oct 11, 2007 7:52 pm It's going to take a long friggin time for a domestic edition. But within a day or two of the Japanese DVD release, there will be a fansub circling every corner of the internet. If you want to know when you can get your hands on it (for free), take the Japanese DVD release, and add 24-72 hours.

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Thu Oct 11, 2007 7:53 pm oh bit torrent gods I give you this eva monkey in exchange for a copy of rebuild with decent subtitles!

[]:             Quote Post by EvaCub » Thu Oct 11, 2007 9:41 pm How much will imports be when It gets released on DVD?

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Thu Oct 11, 2007 9:58 pm Anywhere from $40-$70 I would imagine.

[]:             Quote Post by EvaCub » Thu Oct 11, 2007 9:59 pm Id do it

[]:             Quote Post by Tokpile Quohog » Fri Oct 12, 2007 1:37 am I'd dl it first and then wait for the 15th release of the boxset with director's commentary, deleted scenes, and Anno's severed hand.

[]:             Quote Post by Wevangeliwon » Fri Oct 12, 2007 1:59 am It'll probably either be released Christmas time (if we're super lucky) or, otherwise, early next year. A fan sub will probably be out within a couple of days of that. Although, on the note of cams, since I saw it while I was over in Japan, I can tell you you probably don't want to watch Rebuild first time on a terrible cam.

[]:             Quote Post by Szmitten » Fri Oct 12, 2007 7:12 am The DVD and the sequel will probably be out at the same time, and I'd happily approximate this as just before Easter/March.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Fri Oct 12, 2007 9:03 am Tokpile Quohog wrote: ...and Anno's severed hand.

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Fri Oct 12, 2007 9:46 am Speaking of DVD and sequel releases.... Its kinda funny 2.0 doesn't have an official release date yet. I guess their original proposal of 2.0 coming out in January 2008 might not be reached. As for DVD....I don't know for sure but if DVD releases are as rushed as they are in the states then I'd say mid-December would be your best bet.

[]:             Quote Post by EvaCub » Fri Oct 12, 2007 10:27 am The Eva Monkey wrote: Tokpile Quohog wrote: ...and Anno's severed hand.
